strengths: 16+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, matching the 15-year experience bar and the role's cross-stack innovation focus
Active hands-on AI work at re:cinq building MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks, directly aligned with the role's AI platform and AI-powered product mandate

Demonstrated entrepreneurial and intrapreneurial track record: founded GISCollective, built CMSushi, organized Refactoring Dojos at NI, and created public workshops/courses — evidence of the 'startup-within-larger-org' and thought-leadership traits the role prefers
concerns: Title trajectory tops out at Staff/Senior rather than Principal or Director-level IC, with limited explicit evidence of org-wide strategy influence
Cloud experience is present (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) but not framed as deep cloud-platform strategy or advisory work with strategic customers
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, which is listed as preferred

key_factors.factor: Hands-on AI/agentic infrastructure work (MCP, agent frameworks)
15+ years polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend
Founder and community-builder profile (GISCollective, workshops, talks, open source)

response.justification: Bogdan brings 16+ years of multi-domain engineering paired with current, hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq — exactly the builder-fluency the role seeks. His founder history with GISCollective, open-source libraries, conference talks, and self-organized workshops demonstrate the entrepreneurial, inspire-others dimension called out as preferred. Combined with proven high-scale backend experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic and cloud-native delivery at Optilyz, he is a credible candidate to partner with engineering and product teams on AI-driven differentiation.
